remaining_params.SpellDescription: Target legendary creature card in your graveyard gains escape until end of turn. The escape cost is equal to its mana cost plus exile three other cards from your graveyard. (You may cast it from your graveyard for its escape cost this turn.)
remaining_params.TgtPrompt: Select target legendary creature in your graveyard

params.TriggerDescription: When CARDNAME enters, surveil 3. (Look at the top three cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)
